title: gouania andamanica var. andamanica
intro: Gouania andamanica var. andamanica, also known as Andaman Gouania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gouania andamanica var. andamanica include the treatment of fever, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Gouania andamanica var. andamanica is typically prepared in herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
